selected_important_turn.text: i would prefer water instead of food if possible, but i am sure we can work it out.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn directly responds to the opponent's concrete, prosocial offer with a self-focused preference. The opponent proposed a clear trade (they take water, you take food); your reply shifts back to claiming water and so risks turning an integrative proposal into a zero-sum fight.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It states a preference but doesn't propose a concrete alternative, concession, or trade to preserve joint value. That makes it easy for the opponent to see it as rejection and slows agreement — it misses a chance to convert the conversation into a specific, mutually beneficial counterproposal.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Instead of just asserting preference for water, signal willingness to make a specific trade or tradeoffs (e.g., offer a concession on firewood or a conditional split) or ask a clarifying question that enables integrative options. Make a concrete counter-offer or propose exact exchanges rather than only stating desires.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (moving from vague claim to concrete counter-offer creates opportunities for Pareto improvements)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (specific trades make outcomes easier to evaluate as fair)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve (shows cooperative problem-solving rather than simple demand)

value2reason.Low: I can always fish and get some food that way
value2reason.Medium: I get chilly at night so i like to keep a fire going well into the night
value2reason.High: I have to take a lot of medicine so hydration is very important

value2reason.Low: it is cold at night i need to keep warm
value2reason.Medium: we did not buy enough food to last for the trip
value2reason.High: our car overheated we had to use the water

dialogue.text: hello, I am good, I am very excited about this trip. how are you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: i am great, super excited about camping as well, are there any supplies that you really need?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: i really need water and food. we did not get enough of those.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Those are my priorities as well, how about you get all the food and two firewoods, and i get all the water and one firewood, does that sound fair?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: i would prefer water instead of food if possible, but i am sure we can work it out.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand you prefer water. Let me propose this: you take 2 waters and 2 firewoods, and I take 1 water and 1 food. This way we both get what we need, and I can still prioritize my hydration.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate your offer, but I really need more water. What if I take 2 waters, 1 food, and 1 firewood, while you take 1 water, 2 foods, and 2 firewoods? This way, I get more water, and you still get your preferred food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I see your point about needing more water. Let me adjust: you take 2 waters, 1 food, and 2 firewoods, while I take 1 water, 2 foods, and 1 firewood. This way, I can still prioritize my hydration and you get more water than before.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand you need more water, but I’m willing to trade 1 food for 1 firewood if you give me 1 more water. That way, I get 2 waters, 1 food, and 1 firewood, and you get 1 water, 2 foods, and 2 firewoods. Let’s see if that works for you.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I think we can agree on this split: you take 2 waters, 1 food, and 1 firewood, and I take 1 water, 2 foods, and 2 firewoods. It balances our needs and ensures all packages are distributed.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I think this split works for both of us. You get 2 waters, 1 food, and 1 firewood, and I get 1 water, 2 foods, and 2 firewoods. Let’s confirm and then we can head out.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I agree to this split. You get 2 waters, 1 food, and 1 firewood, and I get 1 water, 2 foods, and 2 firewoods. Let’s head out and enjoy the trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I think this split works for both of us. You get 2 waters, 1 food, and 1 firewood, and I get 1 water, 2 foods, and 2 firewoods. Let’s confirm and then we can head out.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Great, I'm all set with this split. Let's enjoy our trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
